name: site_name
description: Display name used for the forecast site.

name: site_latitude
description: Latitude of the forecast site in decimal degrees.

name: site_longitude
description: Longitude of the forecast site in decimal degrees.

name: site_id
description: Site identifier used to deduplicate daily forecasts.

name: date
description: Forecast target day stored as a normalized timestamp.

name: pm2_5_mean
description: Predicted daily mean PM2.5 concentration in ug/m3.

name: pm2_5_min
description: Predicted daily minimum PM2.5 concentration in ug/m3.

name: pm2_5_max
description: Predicted daily maximum PM2.5 concentration in ug/m3.

name: pm2_5_low
description: Predicted lower PM2.5 forecast bound in ug/m3.

name: pm2_5_high
description: Predicted upper PM2.5 forecast bound in ug/m3.

name: met_latitude
description: Rounded latitude used when fetching met.no forecast data.

name: met_longitude
description: Rounded longitude used when fetching met.no forecast data.

name: met_air_pressure_at_sea_level
description: Daily average met.no air pressure at sea level.

name: met_air_temperature
description: Daily average met.no air temperature.

name: met_cloud_area_fraction
description: Daily average met.no cloud area fraction.

name: met_relative_humidity
description: Daily average met.no relative humidity.

name: met_wind_from_direction
description: Daily average met.no wind direction in degrees.

name: met_wind_speed
description: Daily average met.no wind speed.

name: met_precipitation_amount
description: Daily average met.no precipitation amount.

name: created_at
description: Timestamp when the forecast record was generated.
